Container.Name: calagopus-aio-heavy
Container.Overview: Calagopus is a modern, open-source game server management panel built in Rust. Deploy, monitor, and manage Minecraft, Rust, and other game servers with industry-leading performance. This all-in-one template runs the panel alongside the Wings daemon. Requires separate PostgreSQL (e.g. postgres:18-alpine) and Valkey/Redis (e.g. valkey:latest) containers on the same Docker network.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: pterodactyl wings game servers minecraft rust panel management
Container.Requires: Before starting: (1) Create a custom Docker network named "calagopus" in the Unraid Docker tab (Add Network). (2) Start a PostgreSQL container (e.g. postgres:18-alpine) named "calagopus-db" on the "calagopus" network with POSTGRES_USER=panel, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=panel, POSTGRES_DB=panel, and a /data volume. (3) Start a Valkey/Redis container (e.g. valkey:latest) named "calagopus-cache" on the "calagopus" network with a /data volume. (4) Set APP_ENCRYPTION_KEY to a secure random string (openssl rand -hex 32). (5) Create an empty Wings config file before the first start. Docker requires the host file to exist or it will create a directory instead: touch /mnt/user/appdata/calagopus/wings-config.yml (run this in the Unraid terminal). The container will populate it on first run.
Container.Changes:
### 2026-06-19 - Require wings-config.yml to be pre-created on the host (Docker creates a directory instead of a file if the path is absent)
### 2026-06-18 - Initial release

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the panel WebUI.

Config.Name: SFTP Port
Config.Description: SFTP port for the integrated Wings daemon.

Config.Name: Panel Data
Config.Description: Persistent panel data directory.

Config.Name: Panel Logs
Config.Description: Panel log directory.

Config.Name: Wings Config File
Config.Description: Wings AIO configuration file. Must exist on the host before starting, see setup instructions above (step 5). Docker will create a directory here instead of a file if the path is missing.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket — required for Wings to manage game server containers.

Config.Name: Docker Containers
Config.Description: Docker containers directory — required for Wings.

Config.Name: Pterodactyl Config Dir
Config.Description: Wings main configuration directory (config.yml lives here).

Config.Name: Pterodactyl Data Dir
Config.Description: Wings data directory (server volumes, backups, archives).

Config.Name: Pterodactyl Log Dir
Config.Description: Wings log directory.

Config.Name: Pterodactyl Tmp Dir
Config.Description: Wings temporary directory.

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: Required. A long, random secret key used to encrypt sensitive data. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Change the hostname to match your PostgreSQL container name.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis/Valkey connection URL. Change the hostname to match your Valkey/Redis container name.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.

Config.Name: Run Database Migrations
Config.Description: Automatically run database migrations on startup.

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Internal HTTP port the panel listens on.

Config.Name: Enable Wings Proxy
Config.Description: Enable the Wings proxy.

Config.Name: Use Decryption Cache
Config.Description: Use the decryption cache.

Config.Name: Use Internal Cache
Config.Description: Use the internal cache.

Config.Name: Primary
Config.Description: Mark this instance as primary.

Config.Name: Log Directory
Config.Description: Panel log directory inside the container.

Config.Name: AIO Base Wings Configuration
Config.Description: Path to the base Wings configuration file inside the container.
